snippets.title: Timing and profiling
snippets.code:
%timeit sum(range(1000))      # average over many runs

%%time
total = 0
for i in range(1_000_000):
    total += i                  # times the whole cell once
snippets.explanation: %timeit averages many runs of one statement; %%time reports a single run of the whole cell.

snippets.title: Installing and environment
snippets.code:
%pip install openai tiktoken    # installs into THIS kernel's env
%env OPENAI_API_KEY=sk-...       # set an env var for the session
%whos                            # list current variables
snippets.explanation: %pip avoids the 'installed but not importable' trap; %env scopes config to the session.

snippets.title: Autoreload while editing modules
snippets.code:
%load_ext autoreload
%autoreload 2                    # re-import changed modules automatically

from utils import build_prompt   # edits to utils.py take effect without restart
snippets.explanation: autoreload 2 reloads all modules before each execution, so edits to imported files apply immediately.

snippets.title: Shell access with !
snippets.code:
!ls -la
!git status
files = !ls *.ipynb              # capture shell output into a Python list
snippets.explanation: ! runs shell commands; assigning the result captures its output lines.
